requirement_topic.en: MASM market-access obligation and regulated-product scope
requirement_topic.zh: MASM市场准入义务与受控产品范围
requirement_topic.zht: MASM市場准入義務與受管產品範圍

summary.en: Mongolia applies a national import regime led by MASM and MNS-linked requirements for regulated products. Lithium batteries and power banks are reviewed through national clearance procedures, and exporters should verify product scope, category code, and conformity expectations before sale in Mongolia. Chinese exports should prepare in-country importer-linked documentation, not rely on domestic marks alone.
summary.zh: 蒙古实行以MASM为主的国家级市场准入制度，并结合MNS相关要求对受控产品进行审查。锂电池和移动电源通常需按国家清单和对应技术要求办理合规程序。中国出口商应在开票和报关前确认产品范围与分类，并通过本地进口商链路提交材料，而不能仅凭国内标志。
summary.zht: 蒙古實行以MASM為主的國家級市場准入制度，並結合MNS相關要求對受控產品進行審查。鋰電池和行動電源通常需按國家清單和對應技術要求辦理合規程序。中國出口商應在開票和報關前確認產品範圍與分類，並透過本地進口商鏈路提交材料，而不能僅憑國內標誌。

standards_or_laws: Mongolia Agency for Standardization and Metrology (MASM) official market-access framework for regulated imported electrical products
Mongolian National Standards (MNS) system used for energy and product-safety documentation in import controls
National customs handling rules for products that require importer-linked conformity evidence

summary.en: China-side GB 31241 and CCC records are common for domestic manufacturing and export preparation. They may support technical risk control but do not replace MASM market-access obligations under Mongolia law.
summary.zh: 中国端的GB 31241与CCC资料在国内生产和出口准备阶段常见，可用于技术基础支撑，但不能取代蒙古法律下的MASM市场准入义务。
summary.zht: 中國端的GB 31241與CCC資料在國內生產和出口準備階段常見，可用於技術基礎支撐，但不能取代蒙古法律下的MASM市場准入義務。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241 baseline requirements for lithium battery safety in China
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) domestic conformity process for applicable electrical products
China export customs and quality documentation workflow

gap.en: Chinese compliance papers are treated as source-side evidence only. The compliance gap is MASM-specific clearance planning, importer-facing records, and evidence wording in the target model and language expectations for Mongolia.
gap.zh: 中国合规文件通常只能作为来源端依据。差距在于蒙古特定的MASM清关与放行要求、进口商责任链条，以及目标市场模型和语言下的证据表述。
gap.zht: 中國合規文件通常只能作為來源端依據。差距在於蒙古特定的MASM清關與放行要求、進口商責任鏈條，以及目標市場模式和語言下的證據表述。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation for in-scope lithium battery and power bank models entering Mongolia under MASM and MNS-linked import rules.
mandatory_status.cn: China GB 31241 and CCC documents are mandatory for China-side compliance only and are not an equivalent substitute for MASM obligations.

source.publisher: Mongolian National Standardization body (MNS) and MASM

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Plan Mongolia entry as a separate legal-administrative process with MASM-oriented requirements and importer-led submission responsibilities. Chinese marks and reports help technical alignment but are not, by themselves, market-entry clearance in Mongolia.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 将蒙古市场准入按独立法定程序处理，重点是MASM要求与进口商提交责任。中国标志和报告可用于技术对齐，但单独不足以完成蒙古放行。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 將蒙古市場准入按獨立法定程序處理，重點是MASM要求與進口商提交責任。中國標誌和報告可用於技術對齊，但單獨不足以完成蒙古放行。
